title: Easy Multiplayer
description: The Minecraft modpack, designed for multiplayer optimization, offers performance enhancements for vanilla servers, ensuring smoother gameplay and some helpful features for multiplayer.
body:
# ![Easy Multiplayer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5fed58112162ca55306553faab17298d803f36e.png)


**Easy Multiplayer** modpack has been crafted with the needs of multiplayer vanilla servers in mind. It includes a range of optimizations such as improved memory management, network code optimization, and enhanced chunk processing, which significantly reduce lag and increase overall server stability. With this modpack, players can enjoy smoother and more responsive gameplay, even on servers with a high user count.

## Why should you download ours modpack?

> **1. FPS Improvement:** Our modpack guarantees an increase in frames per second (FPS) on any system, whether it's a high-end gaming PC or a more modest device. This is achieved through meticulous optimization and performance improvements that minimize lag and speed up world loading.
> 
> **2. Additional Convenient Mods:** We've included a range of convenient mods in the modpack that enhance the vanilla gameplay experience, making it more enjoyable and user-friendly. These mods introduce new features and capabilities that are sorely missing for a complete gaming experience on servers.
> 
> **3. Compatibility with Vanilla Servers:** Our modpack is designed to be fully compatible with vanilla servers, allowing players to use it without any compatibility issues.
> 
> **4. Ease of Installation and Use:** We've paid special attention to ensuring that our modpack is easy to install and use, even for users without technical experience.

By choosing our modpack, users not only gain improved performance and new features but also the confidence that their gaming experience will be as comfortable and enjoyable as possible.

## FAQ

[How to install Easy Multiplayer?](https://naberno.gitbook.io/wiki/)
